title: anthyllis vulneraria f. stenophylla
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. stenophylla, also known as kidney vetch or stenophyllous kidney vetch, is a subspecies of the kidney vetch plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria f. stenophylla include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being added to salves and creams for topical application.
